title: Top B.Tech AI and Data Science College in Noida
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering has designed the Programme of B.Tech -Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. This program is a professional engineering undergraduate degree course. Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Programme prepare students with the skills to perform intelligent data analysis which is a key component in numerous real-world applications. During the past ten years, data science has emerged as one of the most high-growth, dynamic, and lucrative careers in technology. This course aims at providing not only the core technologies such as data science, data mining and data modelling but also gives intensive inputs in the areas of data analytics and big data analytics. By the end of this course, the students will gain cross-disciplinary skills across fields such as statistics and logic, and data scientists and will have career opportunities in healthcare, business, eCommerce, social networking companies, climatology, biotechnology, genetics, and other important areas. The major focus of this programme is to equip students with statistical, mathematical reasoning, knowledge discovery, and visualization skills. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 60% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level. 01 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be engaged with leading Global Software Services and Product development companies handling projects in cutting edge technologies. 02 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall serve in technical or managerial roles at Government firms, Corporates and contributing to the society as successful entrepreneurs through start-up. 03 The Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall undertake higher education, research or academia at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 The students of Computer Science and Engineering shall have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 The students of Computer Science and Engineering shall demonstrate Engineering Practice learned through industry internship and research project to solve live problems in various domains. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level.
